rows.description: Computas Matth. Hole Rectoris a secundo Die Novembris 1717 ad eundem diem revoluitum 1718
rows.notes: Based on `gemini-flash` for most letters ('Computas', 'Matth.', 'Rectoris', 'Novembris'), corrected 'revolution' to 'revoluitum' after visual inspection. Acknowledged `gpt-5-mini`'s insight into cursive ambiguities.
